channel.title: Development on Mohammad's Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Development on Mohammad's Personal Website

item.title: Today I Learned: Compound Components
item.description: I rarely enjoy watching talks. However, Ryan Florence’s talk, I recently watched, was one of the most fun talks I watched. He introduces the Compound Component Pattern. It’s the first time I see this pattern and my first thought was on how I wished I learned about it earlier in my career. To learn more about it, I recommend checking out Kent C. Dodds FE Master’s course “Advanced React Components” where he explains the pattern using React 16’s new context API.
